prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-RSSWMB-16PC-65X5X5E-AMZ Product Type: SCREWDRIVER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 16pc Ratchet Screwdriver Set T-Handle Grip with 1/4" Magnetized Bits Home DIY Hand Tools Description: This 16pc interchangable bit screwdriver set comes with a special T-handle grip for easier use. Instead of straining you hand on a tight screw, this hand grip allows you to use more force with less stress on your hand. The set will come in very useful around the house and garage.

This great set has just about every bit and driver you could want. With multiple bits to choose from, this screwdriver set is great for any hobby, task, and more.


SPECIFICATIONS:

- T-Handle Ergonomic Grip
- 15-Piece CRV Bits
- 1-Piece Interchangeable Ratchet Handle
- Bit Size: 1/4-Inch x 1-Inch
- Handle Length: 6.5 Inch
- Color: Yellow

PACKAGE INCLUDES:
(15) Bits
(1) Ratchet Handle Search Terms: hand hobby tools precision screwdriver set jewelry making supplies bezel drill bit set electronics screwdriver set Screwdriver set magnetized bits 16 piece ratchet Features: - Ratchet Screwdriver Set with Magnetized Bits - T-Handle Ergonomic Grip - 15-Piece CRV Bits - 1-Piece Interchangeable Ratchet Handle - Bit Size: 1/4-Inch x 1-Inch === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Magnetized Bits, T-Handle Ergonomic Grip, CRV Bits, 14-Inch Interchangeable, Home And Hobby

openai.title_differentiation: T-Handle Ergonomic Grip, Magnetized CRV Bits, Interchangeable Ratchet Handle, 15 Piece Set, Home DIY
